targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status" or r._field == "tags_ok" or r._field == "tags_error" or r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["plant", "device", "_field", "_value", "_time"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["plant", "device", "_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> group(columns: ["plant"])
  |> count()
  |> keep(columns: ["plant", "_value"])

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tags_error")
  |> last()
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> group(columns: ["plant"])
  |> count()
  |> keep(columns: ["plant", "_value"])

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
